description:
## What
Integrate tantivy as an in-process full-text search engine for posts, wire it into GET /api/v2/search?type=statuses, and provide a CLI reindex command.

## Why
Users need to find their own posts and public posts by keyword without loading the full timeline; tantivy is a pure-Rust, embeddable search library that fits the single-binary constraint.

## Scope
- tantivy index schema and lifecycle (startup, background reindex)
- Index maintenance on post create/edit/delete
- Wire into /api/v2/search?type=statuses
- CLI reindex subcommand
- Config: search_index_path
- Visibility filtering: only own posts and public posts
title: Full-text post search via tantivy
